{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Assistant",
  "description": "Luna Properties and Investment Limited is a Nigerian real estate firm based in the Lekki-Epe axis of Lagos. They focus on selling, developing, and managing genuine and verifiable lands and luxury homes across Lagos, Abuja, and other states.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location: Lagos

Requirements


	Interested candidates should be organized, proactive and detail-oriented individuals who can provide executive support and ensure smooth daily operations.


Method of Applictaion&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: alilinneka@gmail.com using &quot;Personal Assistant&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note


	For more enquiries, call: 07025334773.
	Applicants should stay around Ajah or its environs.
	Join our growing real estate team and be part of a dynamic, professional and result-driven company.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-03",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-04",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Luna Properties and Investment Limited"
    
  },

Personal Assistant Job at Luna Properties and Investment Limited




        
    

        
        Luna Properties and Investment Limited is a Nigerian real estate firm based in the Lekki-Epe axis of Lagos. They focus on selling, developing, and managing genuine and verifiable lands and luxury homes across Lagos, Abuja, and other states.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location: Lagos

Requirements
     

            
    




	Interested candidates should be organized, proactive and detail-oriented individuals who can provide executive support and ensure smooth daily operations.


Method of Applictaion 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Personal Assistant" as the subject of the email.

Note


	For more enquiries, call: 07025334773.
	Applicants should stay around Ajah or its environs.
	Join our growing real estate team and be part of a dynamic, professional and result-driven company.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Mechanical HVAC & Plumbing Design Engineer",
  "description": "Megastar is a leading EPCCM company. We offers substantial construction experience, competitive pricing, financial strength, integrity and a commitment to your project that is supported by a foundation of quality and workplace safety. We are committed to building a thriving workplace where people are inspired, empowered, and supported to do their best work.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Mechanical HVAC &amp; Plumbing Design Engineer
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type:

Role Overview


	We are hiring an experienced Senior Mechanical Design Engineer (HVAC | MEP-BIM) to lead the design, BIM coordination, and delivery of Mechanical Building Services projects from concept to handover.
	The ideal candidate must have strong expertise in HVAC design, supported by working knowledge of Plumbing and Fire Protection systems, with proven experience in MEP Contracting and Design &amp; Build projects.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead HVAC system design and engineering for commercial, industrial, healthcare, hospitality, residential, and mixed-use developments.
	Perform cooling/heating load calculations and design HVAC systems including Chilled Water, VRF/VRV, DX, AHU, FCU, ventilation, and smoke management systems.
	Design and review Plumbing and Fire Protection systems in line with international standards.
	Develop and coordinate BIM models using Revit MEP and conduct clash detection using Navisworks.
	Prepare design documents including drawings, BOQs, technical reports, specifications, shop drawings, and as-built documentation.
	Coordinate with Project Managers, Consultants, Clients, Procurement, and Site teams.
	Lead design reviews, mentor junior engineers, and support value engineering initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Mechanical Engineering.
	Minimum 10 years of experience with a reputable MEP Contractor.
	Valid COREN registration (Mandatory).
	Strong background in HVAC Design, with exposure to Plumbing &amp; Fire Protection systems.
	Proven experience delivering Design &amp; Build projects.
	Advanced proficiency in Revit MEP, AutoCAD, Navisworks, and HAP.
	Experience across commercial, industrial, healthcare, hospitality, residential, logistics, or mixed-use projects.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-03",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-04",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Megastar"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Rivers (PH)",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "201388"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Senior Mechanical HVAC & Plumbing Design Engineer Job at Megastar




        
    

        
        Megastar is a leading EPCCM company. We offers substantial construction experience, competitive pricing, financial strength, integrity and a commitment to your project that is supported by a foundation of quality and workplace safety. We are committed to building a thriving workplace where people are inspired, empowered, and supported to do their best work.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Mechanical HVAC & Plumbing Design Engineer
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type:

Role Overview
     

            
    




	We are hiring an experienced Senior Mechanical Design Engineer (HVAC | MEP-BIM) to lead the design, BIM coordination, and delivery of Mechanical Building Services projects from concept to handover.
	The ideal candidate must have strong expertise in HVAC design, supported by working knowledge of Plumbing and Fire Protection systems, with proven experience in MEP Contracting and Design & Build projects.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead HVAC system design and engineering for commercial, industrial, healthcare, hospitality, residential, and mixed-use developments.
	Perform cooling/heating load calculations and design HVAC systems including Chilled Water, VRF/VRV, DX, AHU, FCU, ventilation, and smoke management systems.
	Design and review Plumbing and Fire Protection systems in line with international standards.
	Develop and coordinate BIM models using Revit MEP and conduct clash detection using Navisworks.
	Prepare design documents including drawings, BOQs, technical reports, specifications, shop drawings, and as-built documentation.
	Coordinate with Project Managers, Consultants, Clients, Procurement, and Site teams.
	Lead design reviews, mentor junior engineers, and support value engineering initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering.
	Minimum 10 years of experience with a reputable MEP Contractor.
	Valid COREN registration (Mandatory).
	Strong background in HVAC Design, with exposure to Plumbing & Fire Protection systems.
	Proven experience delivering Design & Build projects.
	Advanced proficiency in Revit MEP, AutoCAD, Navisworks, and HAP.
	Experience across commercial, industrial, healthcare, hospitality, residential, logistics, or mixed-use projects.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement and Client Relations Officer (Team Lead)",
  "description": "HR Aid Consults - Our client in the manufacturing industry is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement and Client Relations Officer (Team Lead)

Job Location: Ago Palace Way - Okota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Strategic procurement &amp; supply chain leadership
	Financial &amp; commercial acumen
	Client relations &amp; stakeholders management
	High level negotiation skills
	Client-centric &amp; service excellence mindset
	leadership and team management
	Digital &amp; data competence
	Sustainability &amp; ESG awareness.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a BSc / HND qualification with 2-3 years of work experience.


Salary
N250,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: talent@hr-aidconsults.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-03",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-11",

Procurement and Client Relations Officer (Team Lead) Job at HR Aid Consults




        
    

        
        HR Aid Consults - Our client in the manufacturing industry is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement and Client Relations Officer (Team Lead)

Job Location: Ago Palace Way - Okota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	Strategic procurement & supply chain leadership
	Financial & commercial acumen
	Client relations & stakeholders management
	High level negotiation skills
	Client-centric & service excellence mindset
	leadership and team management
	Digital & data competence
	Sustainability & ESG awareness.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a BSc / HND qualification with 2-3 years of work experience.


Salary
N250,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Lead",
  "description": "Awka Millennium City (AMC) is the first smart city in South-East Nigeria, created to redefine what it means to live, work, and thrive in one community. Here, we connect modern homes, schools, healthcare, shopping, worship, and leisure spaces through world-class infrastructure.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Lead

Job Location: Awka, Anambra

Job Summary


	We are seeking a technically strong and well-rounded HR professional to join our team as a HR Lead.
	This role is suited for someone who combines solid HR operations experience with the ability to think in systems, work with data, and improve HR processes across the employee lifecycle.
	You will play a key role in strengthening HR frameworks, supporting performance management, enhancing recruitment processes, and using data to drive better people decisions.
	The role requires a high level of ownership, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently.


Key Responsibilities
Talent Acquisition &amp; Workforce Planning:


	Support and improve end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Partner with hiring managers to define role requirements and hiring plans.
	Track and analyze recruitment metrics to improve efficiency and outcomes.


Performance Management &amp; Organizational Effectiveness:


	Support the implementation of performance management processes, including goal setting, KPIs, and appraisals.
	Track performance outcomes and identify trends across teams.
	Contribute to improving role clarity, team structure, and overall productivity.


HR Data &amp; Analytics:


	Maintain accurate HR data and generate regular reports (headcount, attrition, performance, hiring metrics).
	Analyze data to identify trends, gaps, and actionable insights.
	Develop and maintain HR dashboards using Excel or similar tools.


Learning &amp; Development:


	Coordinate training initiatives and maintain accurate learning records.
	Track training participation and effectiveness.
	Identify capability gaps and support targeted development initiatives.


Employee Relations &amp; Engagement:


	Serve as a point of contact for employee inquiries on HR policies and processes.
	Handle employee relations matters with professionalism and good judgment.
	Support engagement and culture-building initiatives.


HR Operations &amp; Compliance:


	Maintain accurate employee records and ensure audit-ready documentation.
	Support payroll inputs and benefits administration.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and Nigerian labor laws.
	Identify and implement improvements to HR processes and systems.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
	6 - 8 years of progressive HR experience across multiple functions.
	Strong understanding of performance management, HR operations, and employee relations.
	Experience working with HR data, reporting, and Excel.
	Good knowledge of Nigerian labor laws and HR compliance.
	CIPM certification or membership is an advantage.


Key Skills &amp; Attributes:


	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	High attention to detail and data accuracy.
	Ability to work independently and take ownership.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Structured, process-oriented, and improvement-focused mindset.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CVs and Applications to: careers@mpiafrica.com using the Job Position+ Location as subject of the mail.",

HR Lead Job at Awka Millennium City (AMC)




        
    

        
        Awka Millennium City (AMC) is the first smart city in South-East Nigeria, created to redefine what it means to live, work, and thrive in one community. Here, we connect modern homes, schools, healthcare, shopping, worship, and leisure spaces through world-class infrastructure.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Lead

Job Location: Awka, Anambra

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a technically strong and well-rounded HR professional to join our team as a HR Lead.
	This role is suited for someone who combines solid HR operations experience with the ability to think in systems, work with data, and improve HR processes across the employee lifecycle.
	You will play a key role in strengthening HR frameworks, supporting performance management, enhancing recruitment processes, and using data to drive better people decisions.
	The role requires a high level of ownership, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently.


Key Responsibilities
Talent Acquisition & Workforce Planning:


	Support and improve end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Partner with hiring managers to define role requirements and hiring plans.
	Track and analyze recruitment metrics to improve efficiency and outcomes.


Performance Management & Organizational Effectiveness:


	Support the implementation of performance management processes, including goal setting, KPIs, and appraisals.
	Track performance outcomes and identify trends across teams.
	Contribute to improving role clarity, team structure, and overall productivity.


HR Data & Analytics:


	Maintain accurate HR data and generate regular reports (headcount, attrition, performance, hiring metrics).
	Analyze data to identify trends, gaps, and actionable insights.
	Develop and maintain HR dashboards using Excel or similar tools.


Learning & Development:


	Coordinate training initiatives and maintain accurate learning records.
	Track training participation and effectiveness.
	Identify capability gaps and support targeted development initiatives.


Employee Relations & Engagement:


	Serve as a point of contact for employee inquiries on HR policies and processes.
	Handle employee relations matters with professionalism and good judgment.
	Support engagement and culture-building initiatives.


HR Operations & Compliance:


	Maintain accurate employee records and ensure audit-ready documentation.
	Support payroll inputs and benefits administration.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and Nigerian labor laws.
	Identify and implement improvements to HR processes and systems.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
	6 - 8 years of progressive HR experience across multiple functions.
	Strong understanding of performance management, HR operations, and employee relations.
	Experience working with HR data, reporting, and Excel.
	Good knowledge of Nigerian labor laws and HR compliance.
	CIPM certification or membership is an advantage.


Key Skills & Attributes:


	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	High attention to detail and data accuracy.
	Ability to work independently and take ownership.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Structured, process-oriented, and improvement-focused mindset.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CVs and Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position+ Location as subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Head of Retail &amp; Social Media

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Head of Retail & Social Media Job at the Changeroom




        
    

        
        Changeroom was established in 2012 with a vision to produce quality human resource solutions. We plan to achieve this by partnering with our clients to provide highly specialized consulting services in the areas of human resources development and business management services. Our partnership approach affords us the opportunity of working with you to find the most efficient and appropriate solutions to meet your short, medium and long-term goals. In partnering with your organization, we make it our business to understand your business, embrace its values, aims and objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Retail & Social Media
     

            
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Working days / hours: Monday-Friday, some weekends

Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or a related field
	3–5 years' experience in retail management, with exposure to social media marketing
	Demonstrated ability to manage retail teams and drive sales performance
	Hands-on experience managing brand social media accounts with measurable results
	Experience in publishing, books, education, or consumer goods retail is an added advantage.


Salary
Very attractive.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] cc: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
